level_signals: 5+ years of experience in materials planning or equivalent
Base pay range $105,400–$155,000 consistent with mid-senior IC at DoorDash

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 5+ years of experience in materials planning, supply planning, production planning, procurement operations, inventory control, or equivalent experience.
You have experience owning material readiness or clear-to-build planning for hardware, manufacturing, robotics, drones, or equivalent programs.
You are comfortable working with complex bills of materials, supplier lead times, purchase orders, inventory, demand forecasts, and build schedules.
You can operate with ambiguity, build structure where processes are still developing, and communicate risks clearly to cross-functional partners.
You are comfortable working hands-on with physical inventory and systems, including receiving, labeling, organizing, tracking, and preparing materials for builds.

scope.surface: DoorDash Air drone aircraft supply chain — material readiness, clear-to-build planning, inventory, purchasing coordination across prototype, validation, and production builds
scope.business_model: internal robotics/drone program within DoorDash Labs targeting last-mile logistics automation
primary_metrics_inferred: Lead time visibility and expedite reduction
core_responsibilities: Lead material readiness for aircraft builds by translating BOMs, build schedules, inventory, supplier lead times, and open orders into a clear build readiness plan.
Own shortage management and clear-to-build status across prototype, validation, and production builds, including risk tracking and escalation.
Partner with procurement, engineering, manufacturing, and finance to align material availability with program timing and budget needs.
Build scalable processes for inventory accuracy, allocation, receiving, labeling, kitting, and build readiness as the program grows.
Identify long-lead and high-risk materials early, recommend mitigation plans, and help reduce last-minute expediting and build delays.

green_flags: Clear ownership area: clear-to-build planning and material readiness for drone aircraft builds
Comprehensive benefits package described in detail
Novel, high-impact domain (commercial drones / autonomous delivery)
red_flags: Work location not specified — unclear whether this is remote, hybrid, or on-site, and no cities listed for the role itself
Program is early-stage ('scaling to higher-volume production'), which may mean significant ambiguity and process gaps
Hands-on physical inventory requirement may imply mandatory on-site presence not explicitly stated

location.type (not stated in JD body; left as 'unclear')
